source: Snowflake docs research + announced MCP capability (Summit 2025); DDL not executed – feature in private preview

managed.statusReason: CREATE MCP SERVER DDL is not publicly documented or available on this account. Feature announced at Summit 2025, currently in private preview. DDL template captured for activation once enabled.

tools.name: revenue_analyst
tools.description: Converts natural-language revenue/risk questions into SQL against the Revenue Command Center semantic view.

tools.name: revenue_search
tools.description: Searches unstructured revenue documents – incident postmortems, support notes, QBR summaries, renewal playbooks.

tools.name: revenue_agent
tools.description: Full reasoning agent combining Analyst + Search for multi-step revenue-retention analysis.

tools.name: revenue_sql
tools.target: SNOWFLAKE_REVENUE_CC.CORE.[DIM_ACCOUNT, FACT_MONTHLY_REVENUE, FACT_RENEWAL_RISK, FACT_USAGE_DAILY, FACT_SUPPORT_CASES, FACT_FORECAST]
tools.description: Read-only SQL execution scoped to the gold-layer facts and dimensions.

sampleCall.label: contract captured, not executed
sampleCall.client: MCP JSON-RPC over HTTPS (Claude Desktop, Cursor, custom)

arguments.question: What is total revenue at risk this quarter by region?

content.text: Generated SQL and results for revenue at risk by region (shape only – not executed)

tools.name: domo_embed_card
tools.description: Embeds a Domo card/dashboard visual into the MCP response for rich executive summaries.

tools.name: domo_dataset_query
tools.description: Queries a Domo dataset via the MCP bridge for cross-platform metrics not yet in Snowflake.

domoEssentials.note: Domo MCP connector is a separate beta program (Domo Everywhere + MCP bridge). Requires Domo instance pairing and OAuth federation. Not part of the Snowflake-managed MCP server DDL.
